transcript: Squats are a great lower body exercise, and they incorporate most of the major muscle groups in your legs and your core. Step-ups are a great way to incorporate balance training into your lower body strength training. Planks are a great upper body exercise, but they can be pretty difficult. By adding an incline, it decreases the intensity and makes it so everybody can be successful. Push-ups can also be a very challenging exercise, but by adding an incline,
